subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath caused to flow from the Pen the mysteries of eternity and through them hath quickened the peoples who turned unto Him when He appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی اجری من القلم اسرار القدم و بها احیی الامم الذین اقبلوا اذ ظهر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
